Name: FComboButtonStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SComboButton

Variables.Name: ButtonStyle
Variables.Description: The style to use for our SButton

Variables.Name: DownArrowImage
Variables.Description: Image to use for the down arrow

Variables.Name: MenuBorderBrush
Variables.Description: Brush to use to add a "menu border" around the drop-down content

Variables.Name: MenuBorderPadding
Variables.Description: Padding to use to add a "menu border" around the drop-down content
